title: Agent code reviews: 1,200 tests per PR
meta_description: Cut agent review time from 2h 12m to 1m 52s with automated gates — static analysis, ephemeral tests, and risk-based escalation using checkov 3.2.117, Node 20 LTS, and AWS Lambda.
full_title: Agent code reviews: 1,200 tests per PR
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $800k+ on human reviewers for AI-generated PRs.

We cut review time 93% and saved $802k per year by automating 80% of the gate.

https://kubaik.github.io/agent-code-reviews-1200-tests-per-pr

#Blockchain #GenerativeAI #GitHub #AgentCodeReview
